arts.ttl: Preview: Heidenheim vs. Stuttgart - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Heidenheim and Stuttgart, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Weekend acca predictions: Five teams to back across Europe
arts.sum: There is plenty of quality domestic action taking place across Europe this weekend with the festive season upon us and Aaron Rogan is on hand with a five-team acca for consideration.
